title: NHS Healthcare Assistant CV Example UK — Band 2 & Band 3

cv.name: Priya Sharma
cv.title: Healthcare Assistant
cv.summary: Band 3 Healthcare Assistant with 3 years on acute medical wards at an NHS Foundation Trust. Experienced in patient personal care, vital signs, EPR documentation, and multidisciplinary team working. Enhanced DBS held.

bullets: Supported 12–15 patients daily with washing, dressing, nutrition, and mobility
Recorded observations and escalated NEWS2 scores to nursing staff promptly
Maintained zero patient handling incidents over 24 months
Supported domiciliary visits for 10+ patients weekly under RN supervision
Completed Trust mandatory training including safeguarding and infection control

education.raw:
Care Certificate — 2020
NVQ Level 2 Clinical Healthcare Support · Enhanced DBS
